JOIN OUR TEAM

**As of October 2025 we have reopened our hiring process.**

Are you passionate about working with us?  Do you thrive in a collaborative environment where innovation and creativity are valued? If so, we want you to join our team!

At Shield Security Services, we believe in assembling a diverse team of talented individuals who share our vision and values. Whether you’re a seasoned professional or just starting your career journey, we welcome individuals who are dedicated, enthusiastic, and eager to make a difference.

Our team reviews each application carefully and considers every candidate based on their qualifications and fit for the role. While we may not be actively hiring for every position now, we’re always on the lookout for exceptional talent to join our growing team.

Join us in shaping the future of Shield and making a positive impact on our community. We look forward to hearing from you and potentially welcoming you to our team!

Which position are you applying for? *
What level of security clearance do you have? *
